title: Mid Q4 2022 Freight Market Review
summary:
Main
While the crude tanker market continues its rally and the clean market lags, Russia's approach to the oil price cap will shape freight rates at a time when freight market dynamics are experiencing significant upheavals. By Mary Melton
As we reach the end of Q4 2022, we examine the key dynamics which have shaped crude and clean tanker markets and will continue to do so in the near term. Global demand reshuffling of the crude markets has led to declining outlets for Russian cargoes in ‘traditional', mainly European, markets.
